## evidence

<!-- for new heuristics: tx hashes + block numbers showing the rule fires correctly.

## checklist

- [ ] tests added or updated
- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] new heuristics carry a rule id and entry in `docs/heuristics.md`
- [ ] no wallet, signer, or trading code introduced
- [ ] author identity matches CODEOWNERS for the touched zone
